name: New T.R.A.P. program at your university.
description:
Congratulations! You are a student at the University of Sisson (USiss), a small but extremely prestigious university located somewhere in the united states, I don’t really care where! USiss accepts only the best, it is a place that the strongest minds and strongest athletes can meet, completely free of legacy picks.

Unfortunately for you, the excitement of the school year has made you complacent and your grades are slipping. BAD.

The dean has offered you one last lifeline, the T.R.A.P. Program. You will be feminized in an attempt to rid you of your ego and get you back on track in your studies.

• Take new Feminizing classes

• Go to the beach with your trans mentor

• Get closer to your professors

• Get railed by the entire hockey team

Go nuts! Have a good time, but don’t slack off too much, or you might just get punished.

This is the personal section, stop reading if you don’t care. Go get feminized ya’ freaks!

I see people so personal life things in here, imma do that too cause I wanna feel included. I got my boyfriend a jacket for Christmas! It has kitty cats on it and it’s very cute and I hope he likes it. It was way too expensive for him to not like it anyways.

Anyways, this is very obviously inspired by the S.I.S.S.Y academy bot by @mysteras. I just didn’t like how rape-y it was, so I made a nicer one. People should treat you like a human in this one. if thats not your thing, check out the other bot. I HIGHLY recommend a proxy, good lord will JLLM struggle with this one. Description left open so you can see all the characters beforehand if you so wish. If you have any critiques, post a comment. If you have any bots that you want me to make, I can do that too I guess. Have fun!

Art by @pompom625tn on twitter.
creator: AladorB
